Intelligent SDG Ecosystem

Everything you need to drive measurable impact across all 17 Sustainable Development Goals.

🤖

AI SDG Alignment

Auto-classify projects into UN SDGs using AI-powered classification engine.

📊

Impact Scoring

Standardized 0-1000 scoring with multi-factor weighted formula.

🤝

Smart Matching

Data-driven NGO-Corporate partnership recommendations.

🗺️

Live Heatmap

Interactive map visualizing SDG funding & NGO distribution.

🔗

Transparent Ledger

SHA-256 hashed activity logs for immutable verification.

🏛️

Gov Intelligence

Funding gap analysis & risk projection for policy makers.
